calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
John Eng, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank N.A., a National Banking Assoc.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: eric J. Diesel as follows:
Principal $36,806.57
Prejudgment Interest $2,540.16
Costs $354.50 for a total of $39,701.23
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.

Off Calendar Nov-16-2004 Continued To Jan-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
